title: phyllostachys tianmuensis
intro: Phyllostachys tianmuensis, also known as Tianmu Bamboo, is a species of bamboo that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Phyllostachys tianmuensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory infections, among others. The plant is often prepared as a herbal decoction or tea, and can also be used in the form of dried slices or powder for various medicinal purposes.
